brandSub: Protocol · Diplomacy · Public Communication · Security · Communicology
metaDesc: How to submit a paper to WPA Journal by email during the preparation phase.
title: Submit Your Paper
deck: Editorial intake for WPA Journal. Submissions are handled by email during the preparation phase.
k002: This page explains how to send a manuscript to WPA Journal. Sending a paper does not guarantee acceptance or publication. Every submission goes through editorial screening for scope, quality and integrity.
k003: The form is in preparation. Until the automated submission system is activated, papers are submitted by email to worldprotocolacademy@gmail.com.
k005: Protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security studies, communicology, cultural diplomacy, institutional communication and protocol scenarios.
k006: What to include in your submission email
k007: Please structure your email so the editorial office can process it efficiently. Include the following information:
k014: Article type and language (Macedonian or English)
k017: Each submission must include three short statements from the author:
k018: Ethics declaration — the work follows research and publication ethics.
k019: Originality declaration — the work is original and not under review elsewhere.
k020: AI-use declaration — any use of AI tools is disclosed; the author remains responsible for accuracy.
k022: Authors retain copyright. WPA Journal publishes under a Creative Commons BY-NC-ND 4.0 license unless otherwise agreed. By submitting, the author consents to editorial communication.
k024: When your email is ready, send it to the editorial office. Responses are handled according to editorial availability.
k026: WPA Journal is an independent institutional publication platform of World Protocol Academy. External indexing, ISSN, DOI and other bibliographic statuses are listed only when officially obtained.
